channel.title: Case Studies | Roadie
channel.description: Stay up to date on the most current business trends in last-mile and crowdsourced delivery. Keep up with Roadie in the news and on our blog!

item.title: How Pinch Grew Reach and Sales While Empowering Local Healthcare Entrepreneurs with Roadie | Roadie
item.description:
The Situation

Pinch Med Spa is a tech-enabled concierge medical spa founded to empower Nurse Practitioners to run their own mobile med spa that supplements their day job. Pinch offers everything their expert providers need – from insurance and training to marketing and software. One key aspect of providing medical spa treatments at home is the products and supplies for each appointment.
item.content:encoded:
The Situation

Pinch Med Spa is a tech-enabled concierge medical spa founded to empower Nurse Practitioners to run their own mobile med spa that supplements their day job. Pinch offers everything their expert providers need – from insurance and training to marketing and software. One key aspect of providing medical spa treatments at home is the products and supplies for each appointment.
item.dc:creator: Roadie

item.title: Roadie enables ScriptDrop to ramp up delivery and reach more customers
item.description:
The Situation

ScriptDrop is a healthcare technology company that connects pharmacies to a network of qualified delivery partners to enable prescription delivery across the U.S. Since 2016, it has helped patients get their prescriptions quickly, conveniently, and securely from pharmacies nationwide.
item.content:encoded:
The Situation

ScriptDrop is a healthcare technology company that connects pharmacies to a network of qualified delivery partners to enable prescription delivery across the U.S. Since 2016, it has helped patients get their prescriptions quickly, conveniently, and securely from pharmacies nationwide.
item.dc:creator: Roadie

item.title: Nothing Bundt Cakes Increases Sales by Expanding Delivery Nationwide | Roadie
item.description:
The Situation

Founded in 1997 in Las Vegas, Nothing Bundt Cakes is a niche bakery concept with a successful, nationwide franchise operation with more than 300 bakeries that feature an intentional mom and pop shop feel. While delivery is often a core competency for bakeries, it was a struggle to identify a delivery provider that could offer consistent, easy-to-use, reliable service for franchise owners across the country. Some franchisees built their own delivery offering with bakery employees making milk runs. But, this took employees away from the tasks they were best at and added extra time and pain managing delivery. The corporate office needed to find an approved vendor that could easily embed into store operations across the U.S.
item.content:encoded:
The Situation

Founded in 1997 in Las Vegas, Nothing Bundt Cakes is a niche bakery concept with a successful, nationwide franchise operation with more than 300 bakeries that feature an intentional mom and pop shop feel. While delivery is often a core competency for bakeries, it was a struggle to identify a delivery provider that could offer consistent, easy-to-use, reliable service for franchise owners across the country. Some franchisees built their own delivery offering with bakery employees making milk runs. But, this took employees away from the tasks they were best at and added extra time and pain managing delivery. The corporate office needed to find an approved vendor that could easily embed into store operations across the U.S.
item.dc:creator: Roadie

item.title: Roadie helps top U.S. airline scale delivery capacity by 600% in real-time | Roadie
item.description:
The Situation

Since 2015, Roadie has been working with airline partners across 71 U.S. airports to quickly reunite customers with their mishandled bags. In fact, Roadie drivers have a track record for delivering mishandled bags up to 50% faster for all five major U.S. airlines.
item.content:encoded:
The Situation

Since 2015, Roadie has been working with airline partners across 71 U.S. airports to quickly reunite customers with their mishandled bags. In fact, Roadie drivers have a track record for delivering mishandled bags up to 50% faster for all five major U.S. airlines.
item.dc:creator: Roadie

item.title: Tractor Supply Company Delivers Same-Day from 100% of Stores | Roadie
item.description:
The Situation

Tractor Supply Company first partnered with Roadie on home delivery in 2017. Founded as a mail-order tractor parts business in 1938, its customers are located all over the country, including smaller cities and towns outside the coverage areas of traditional delivery networks. Roadie enabled Tractor Supply to begin a methodical expansion of same-day delivery for items ranging from livestock feed and dog food to tillers and riding lawnmowers. When the novel coronavirus COVID-19 became a global pandemic, the need for same-day delivery became urgent and Tractor Supply suddenly needed to compress its rollout timeline from a few months to a few weeks.
item.content:encoded:
The Situation

Tractor Supply Company first partnered with Roadie on home delivery in 2017. Founded as a mail-order tractor parts business in 1938, its customers are located all over the country, including smaller cities and towns outside the coverage areas of traditional delivery networks. Roadie enabled Tractor Supply to begin a methodical expansion of same-day delivery for items ranging from livestock feed and dog food to tillers and riding lawnmowers. When the novel coronavirus COVID-19 became a global pandemic, the need for same-day delivery became urgent and Tractor Supply suddenly needed to compress its rollout timeline from a few months to a few weeks.
item.dc:creator: Roadie

item.title: The Home Depot elevates the customer experience and differentiates with same-day | Roadie
item.description:
The Situation

When The Home Depot announced its billion-dollar plan to reimagine its supply chain in 2018, it launched a “One Supply Chain” vision to streamline logistics, increase product velocity and reach the majority of its customers in two days or less. They started testing last-mile delivery in proof-of-concept trials with several leading delivery platforms. The objective was to test emerging delivery models to improve convenience and speed-to-market – key drivers of loyalty for DIY consumers – with the goal of shrinking delivery times from warehouses and stores to customer’s doors.
item.content:encoded:
The Situation

When The Home Depot announced its billion-dollar plan to reimagine its supply chain in 2018, it launched a “One Supply Chain” vision to streamline logistics, increase product velocity and reach the majority of its customers in two days or less. They started testing last-mile delivery in proof-of-concept trials with several leading delivery platforms. The objective was to test emerging delivery models to improve convenience and speed-to-market – key drivers of loyalty for DIY consumers – with the goal of shrinking delivery times from warehouses and stores to customer’s doors.
item.dc:creator: Roadie
